title: Add pagination to the user list endpoint
body:
## Problem

The `/api/users` endpoint currently returns all users without pagination, which causes performance issues at scale.

## Proposed Solution

Add `page` and `per_page` query parameters with defaults of `page=1` and `per_page=20`.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `GET /api/users?page=1&per_page=20` returns the first 20 users
- [ ] Response includes `X-Total-Count` header
- [ ] Response includes `Link` header with next/prev/first/last
- [ ] Unit tests cover edge cases (empty results, last page, invalid params)
